creator: braslau@free.fr
text:
Media Folder view does not sort correctly:
- directory names containing non-ascii (utf8) characters are (sorted and) listed *after* directory names containing ascii-only characters;
- filenames containing non-ascii (utf8) characters are (sorted and) listed *before* filenames containing ascii-only characters, but not always: some non-ascii filenames can be found at the *end* of the sorted list (I have even seen both cases together).

This bug does *not* affect the sorting of tags scanned into the database, only the Media Folder view.

Thank you

Alan
